nasb.text: For as high as the heavens are above the earth, So great is His lovingkindness toward those who fear Him.

esv.text: For as high as the heavens are above the earth, so great is his steadfast love toward those who fear him;

cnv.text: 天離地有多高， 他的慈愛向敬畏他的人也有多大。

ccb.text: 因为天离地有多高， 祂对敬畏祂之人的爱也多大！

csbs.text: 因为天离地有多么高， 他的慈爱向敬畏他的人也多么大；
